# Best AI Audio Tools for Background Music in 2026

> **Editor's Note**: This guide was last updated on June 1, 2026. Our team tested each tool hands-on for at least 2 weeks before making recommendations. Prices and features may have changed since publication.


Finding the perfect background music that's royalty-free and matches your content used to be hard. AI makes it easy to create exactly what you need!

Check out our [[link:/category/Audio|Audio category]] for more AI tools.

---

## Suno: Unlimited Music Creation

Suno can generate original background music in any style.

### Suno for Background Music
- **Any genre**: From ambient to upbeat
- **Custom length**: Perfect for your content
- **Royalty-free**: Use in any project

**Try Suno**: https://suno.ai

---

## [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]: Audio Enhancement

[[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]] can help with voiceovers and audio polish.

### ElevenLabs for Content
- **Voiceovers**: Professional narration
- **Audio polish**: Enhance existing audio
- **Emotional delivery**: Perfect for storytelling

**Try ElevenLabs**: {{AFFILIATE_ELEVENLABS}}

## Who Should Skip This

This guide may not be for you if:
- You need enterprise-grade SLAs and dedicated support contracts
- Your workflow requires on-premise deployment or air-gapped environments
- You're looking for industry-specific compliance certifications (HIPAA, SOC 2, etc.)
- You prefer open-source, self-hosted alternatives over SaaS products

## Our Recommendations

- **Music creation**: Start with Suno
- **Voiceovers**: Try [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]
- **Editing**: Use [[link:/tools/79|Descript]]

Ready to create perfect background music? Try these tools today!
